tagline: The following updates were made to Lakeflow Designer: Enabled by default: Lakeflow Designer is now enabled by default for all free edition, premium, and enterprise tier workspaces.
what_it_does: The following updates were made to Lakeflow Designer: Enabled by default: Lakeflow Designer is now enabled by default for all free edition, premium, and enterprise tier workspaces. To get started, click +New in the sidebar and select Visual data prep. If you don't see this option, contact your workspace admin.
why_it_matters: Bug fixes and improvements: Fixed multiple issues including right click canvas behavior, undo/redo button state, Markdown node underline formatting, and unconfigured filter condition handling.
key_takeaway: The following updates were made to Lakeflow Designer: Enabled by default: Lakeflow Designer is now enabled by default for all free edition, premium, and enterprise tier workspaces.
